description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the rust:1.45.2 Docker image and defines two stages: build and deploy. In the build stage add a build_game job that runs before_script commands rustup target add wasm32-unknown-unknown and cargo install --version 0.2.63 wasm-bindgen-cli, caches /root/.cargo/registry and target, then executes the script steps: cargo build; cargo build --features network; cargo test; sh -c "cd client-web && cargo build --release --target wasm32-unknown-unknown"; wasm-bindgen target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/client_web.wasm --out-dir client-web --browser --no-typescript --no-modules --no-modules-global client_web; mkdir output; cp client-web/client_web_bg.wasm client-web/client_web.js output/; cp client-web/index.html client-web/index.js output/. It archives the output directory as an artifact. In the deploy stage add a pages job that runs only on the master branch, creates a public directory, copies all files from output into public, and publishes the public directory as a GitLab Pages artifact.
